title: Underwriting Auction for sale of Government Securities for ₹32,000 crore on June 12, 2026
description: Government of India has announced the sale (re-issue) of Government Securities, as detailed below, through auction to be held on June 12, 2026 (Friday). As per the extant scheme of underwriting commitment notified on November 14, 2007, the amounts of Minimum Underwriting Commitment (MUC) and the minimum bidding commitment under Additional Competitive Underwriting (ACU) auction, applicable to each Primary Dealer (PD), are as under: (₹ crore) Security Notified Amount MUC amount per PD Minimu
